response.overview: Now that the dust has settled, focusing on the facts and evidence that was overlooked, we revisit the Jodi Arias trial & the crime that took place. The Within Range podcast brings on a guest close to key figures surrounding the Jodi Arias case. What really happened that night, and why did the trial last so long?
response.tagline: Focusing on overlooked evidence, revisit the Jodi Arias trial with The Within Range podcast as they bring on a guest close to key figures surrounding the case. What really happened that night?
response.title: Dear Jodi
